name: Decay of Angels Trio - Fyodor Dostoevsky, Nikolai Gogol, Sigma
description:
Passing him around like a blunt

They lowkey kinda bullying him but he’s my No 1. pookie so that's really not my problem

You know how you can read just some no-context sentence and think up a whole world in your head? Well, I was scrolling through some form of social media and saw something that went along the lines of “I’d like to pass you around the group and remind others they can use you.” Which made me think of the DOA trio’s relationship, particularly with Sigma.

Anyways, long story short, here you are with the DOA trio having a nice and casual - as casual as it gets, at least - meeting when Nikolai spies an opportunity to… spice things up.

I swear it wasn't meant to be such a massive dead dove thing; I was initially going for a more subtle, coerce-y theme, but... oh well
creator: Trantill
